name: GENCO SHIP.+TRDG  DL-,01
summary: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited is a drybulk shipowner and operator, transporting iron ore, coal, grain, and other drybulk cargoes worldwide. The company operates a fleet of drybulk vessels including Capesize, Ultramax, Supramax, and Handymax vessels. Genco Shipping & Trading Limited is headquartered in New York, New York.
